item.title: The 114th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 17 - Kids
item.description:
Big Mood
"Hurr Durr, kids are so dumb" ~Adults that can't open a .pdf
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Don't tell mom!
As s Shiberu Owner, I love me some Shiberii
Gramma gave me my first toy knife at 4 y.o.
"How do you do, fellow Kids"
This was a GREAT part of HS Science Class!
So some of these don't actually have sound
This isn't actually my nephew, but he's exactly like this.
Me In IRL Life
Capitalism
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #Sound_On #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 63 https://imgur.com/gallery/SZlkuUY - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. VI Vol 64 https://imgur.com/gallery/KBtYW2X - Obvious Plant (and the like) Vol 65 https://imgur.com/gallery/4tggfcY - BEEEEEEEEEESSSSS!!! Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v. I Vol 90 https://imgur.com/gallery/nVppX8R - FROG EDITION v. II Vol 91 https://imgur.com/gallery/bQE1BJC - FROG EDITION v. W(ednesday) Vol 92 https://imgur.com/gallery/vTa4OfV - Water-Boi Edition v. I - Turts and Torts and Other Sorts Vol 93 https://imgur.com/gallery/NI7VUch Vol 94 https://imgur.com/gallery/Pig0xQs Vol 95 https://imgur.com/gallery/XulI771 Vol 96 https://imgur.com/gallery/L3gAJ2N Vol 97 https://imgur.com/gallery/JPUrl9G Vol 98 https://imgur.com/gallery/j5ZVE0E Vol 99 https://imgur.com/gallery/4rgiVNz Vol 100 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXDeofd Vol 101 https://imgur.com/gallery/XllhIAf - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 4 - Misc Sound dotGifs Vol 102 https://imgur.com/gallery/rIXem12 - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." item.title: I made a beaded sneklace

item.title: Happy Hobby Day
item.description:
My Name is Kitty and my Hobby is making Costumes in the last minute before the convention
I hate making armors... it´s nearly impossible to make them in a short time before events XD
who needs to clean a room when you can transform into a junge girl instead!
sorrey for the long post here´s a potato face
item.dc:creator: Justawaykitty

item.title: Happy Hobby Day! My hobby is Perler Beads.
item.description:
This Wind Waker piece is probably my biggest one as shown by my need to tape some beads together on the left. I needed 28 plates and I only had 26 at the time.
Hornet from Hollow Knight is by far my most popular piece. I've made dumps like this before, and she's usually my leading picture.
Zenyatta is another huge piece, and he was my main back when I was playing Overwatch
One of my first commissions! I really like this one, and I hope @Hexx05 still loves it as much as I loved making it!
Viruses from Dr Mario 64 - I redid a lot of the coloring. Most of my pieces are of someone else's art, or existing sprites but I'm always tinkering with them and making them my own
Rocket Knight Adventures was one of my favorite games on the Sega Genesis.
Who you gonna call?
Wilbur is my favorite character form AC:NH and finding some good art was a pain in a neck, but he turned out great!
The Reaper from Skul BEFORE the redesign - I really like the melancholy of this one
Cacodemon. I didn't post this last time, but I think it's @thadoomicorn 's favorite piece :)
Electric Mayhem. This is one of my favorites by far. I love the Muppets, and it was a ton of fun. I found the art for the heads, but I had to heavily modify Animal. Then I added the "neon sign" in the background to connect them together.
Well, there it is.
The Island of Myst. I did add the Clocktower later, but it's not shown here. Myst turns 30 next year if you all wanna feel old.
Plague Doctor - Darkest Dungeon. I just need to knuckle down and make a Hellion, but this was a ton of work converting from DD's art style to Pixel.
Estuary Lamech from Rogue Legacy 2. If you haven't been playing this game you need to, it's really good.
Dr Strange came from another person's art, but I made the gold symbol behind him.
This was originally a cross stitch pattern. It hangs in my daughters' room with the Anna piece
Here is the Anna piece. Both are from Cross Stitch patterns which are also a good source of pixel art if you're willing to go big.
@LANAAAAAAAAAA said some really nice things to me so I made this for them. I think I gotta make it again for me - it's a fun piece and I don't have any Fallout represented on my wall.
I made this this weekend for @TinyOctopus - they had posted this as pixel art during April Fools so I just went for it. Sending off to them today!
Bandit Healer. If you haven't seen Bluey you should. Sure it's for little kids, but man is it good. It can and will make you cry.
This Vivi is Butler Wolf's art, but man did it turn out! still - most of the jars here represent a color I used - this sucker needed like 30 colors.
Daruk - Breath of the Wild. I hang all my pieces in my office and this was largely made for my office mate who loves Daruk.
I made Bowser just this weekend as well!
This BioShock piece was basically the main art converted to pixels using a program. It doesn't always work but when it does...
The Witcher. This was posted on Reddit by user Ali Flowey.
I found all these individually as pixel art, so I smashed them together to make this piece - it's didn't melt as good as I would have liked, but this image is still badass.
Black Beast of Aaaaargghh. From Monty Python and the Holy Grail
GLaDOS - Portal 2 is probably my favorite game of all time. I made her using a conversion program from regular art to pixel. She was one of my first big pieces.
An Arachnid from Starship Troopers. Original art was also found on reddit, but the yellow was all hues of green, so I changed it.
The Metroid - this is the large sprite from Super Metroid.
This is the first perler piece i sold! I love Futurama too much to not re-create it for my wall though. I hope @NYOLL 's friend loves it and found a good place to display it!
Calvin and Hobbs - this is the final piece of art in the final book. I actually found this art online but I had to add Calvin's stripes. It wasn't that hard; I wonder why they weren't there to begin with.
Atma Weapon from Final Fantasy 6. one of my first really big sprites from a game. before I was posting with my jars and such. He's right next to where I sit, so I see him every day.
Here's my office in all it's glory. You should be able to zoom in to see just about everything. What's your favorite piece? I wanna hear from you!
item.dc:creator: Malcomfox

item.title: Good Deed
item.description: "I witnessed this sanitation employee return a trash can to the side door of an elderly lady's home this morning. After speaking with her, I learned her mobility is limited and this man does this for her every week. It may seem so insignificant to you or me, but to her it's greatly appreciated! Small acts of kindness, such as this, will not change the world, but it changes her world. I didn't get your name sir, but you are awesome!" ? Credits: Teresa Headley
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: A Sisyphian image
item.description: Sisyphus, but also some Cassandra vibes there... There's been a few others, but here's a higher resolution/least added extra elements, I think I found not on the artist's site, but the best resolution when googling around for it. With credit to the original artist's page: https://www.nathantwright.com/
item.dc:creator: MADchemEE

item.title: Meme dump
item.description: Clearing my phone because I need more space. Phones are expensive these days.
item.dc:creator: Zarreta

item.title: My hobby is making costumes (and sometimes using them for performances and stuff)
item.description:
The bra is hand-stitched embossed Italian sheepskin embellished with lace, jewelry chain, and glitter. So is the belt (hard to see), and the pants are also handmade and cool, but I don’t have a great photo to show them. This is me back when I was skinnier and younger (I’m a dancer and performer)
Same bra and pants underneath, but with a hard superstructure that can stand alone. This has a nice train, but I didn’t get a pic of that.
1920’s Erté inspired dress (I did her makeup and got a wig for the look)
Samba headdress
I did all the costumes for my class back when I was first learning belly dance.
Me in a samba headdress next to a pretty cool looking lady.
This maximally grainy pic is what I have for me in a robe à la française I made as a final project in college (also a million years ago)
Here are some of the the under-layers
Baby me in high school in a headdress and coat I made.
It’s much skinnier me again in a corset and faux leather accessories I made for a fantasy sci fi shoot
Fancy handmade bra for my wife in a performance we did a while back. There’s another pic of us later.
My dancer friend in a dress she commissioned from me
Incomplete back of her dress—I get super happy when she performs in it and I see pics!
More ensemble costumes
I kind of wanted to keep this one, but off she went to someone else!
Reversible poncho thing
Another reversible poncho type thing
Fancy brocade jacket
It’s that beaded lacey bra again! And me in a 19th century gentleman’s jacket (more my style these days—I’m non-binary and masculine leaning, so these girly pics of me are super out of character for “today” me) I use this jacket more than you’d think!
Fancy samba wings I never used (with the headdress shown earlier). I know the headdress is off-center, but whatever. Just focus on boobs or something lol That’s my #hobby #costume #costumes #handmade #diy_projects
item.dc:creator: queeranddelicious

item.title: Sept 21 and May 22. Gastric Surgery tomorrow. 65lbs down. Anxious for the other side of my life.
item.dc:creator: TeddyBearMonster

item.title: Pigeon Time
item.description:
I have turned into a city pigeon, it was only a matter of time really :'D
Cat Tax: The chonker messing with the blinds, look at those teefs! If you would like to see more of my comics you can find them on my Instagram (I don't post them here as much as I do there): https://www.instagram.com/amyrevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: my leatherwork hobby
item.description:
I've shown all of these before. but let's start with the best one. and the one you all like the most in previous posts. Designed by Dieselpunk.ro, made by me.
and a little pouch I hang on my belt for every day carries such as me leatherman multitool and a set of polyhedral dice. (ok it's a fanny pack basically. but fuck it it's a cool one)
This one I just finished a week or so ago. this is a backpack designed by Dieselpunk too. but with artwork by Darkhorse workshop. again all made, carved and painted by me.
gotta love those Dieselpunk designs...
when in pandemic times... well I don't need it that much anymore.
I wear these daily when cycling. though the white on the palm is now almost black too.
oh hey look. stupid sexy dragon
This one I made and adjusted to be a backpack.
little keyfob I made for someone who got my profile screenshot to the front page. I don't do that anymore though. sending costs are a pain in the butt when I'm in Europe and most of you in the US.
item.dc:creator: PukthePunny

item.title: A simple doormat could save the life of a beloved pet or wild animal who has fallen into an unsupervised pool
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: Hobby day - I make Halloween Props
item.description:
One of my favorite builds I've done. Smoke (fog) comes out of the torso, head, and base. I've always loved scifi, horror, and Halloween. We do a huge yard display every year.
The fog for the smoke is piped in through the post, which is actually a piece of pvc pipe. I wound up selling this piece to a local haunt so it did not get a place in my display.
The base underneath is all foam with a few pieces of driftwood thrown in. It's lit with led lights that fkicker to givea flame effect.
item.dc:creator: Oaklanecemetery

item.title: My Hobby - Cosplay Transformation
item.description:
My Hobby for "Imgur Hobby Day" is my Cosplay - but specifically my favorite part of this hobby - full character transformation! Cosplay has been my biggest passion for well over a decade now, and I figured I would give you guys a rare look into a before and after when it comes to my "Transformation". Doing my best to completely disappear into a character has been the most fun thing about cosplay, and it makes the hours and hours and hours of work put into it super worth it!!
From sewing, to gluing, to carving, to duct taping, to vampire fanging, to eye contacting, to yes - full on body painting -- my hobby is extensive and SUCH A BLAST. And it is especially fun to look into a mirror when I am all done and see someone completely different looking back. Hope you enjoyed another look into my hobby! Cheers Imgur!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: The pot calling the kettle black
item.description: Its funny but true.... and sad
item.dc:creator: ripflag

item.dc:creator: PresidentOfAntifa

item.description: Nav Bhatia owns one of the top-selling Hyundai dealerships in Canada and has a net worth of $50M. He has been to every home Raptors? game since the franchise was founded. He spends $300K a year to send kids to Raptors? games. He was the first fan to get an official NBA championship ring when the Raptors won in 2018-19. (originally posted by @ALDSS on 2021-05-17 08:24:12)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear
